## 📋 Today's Overview
*July 02, 2026*

### Superconductivity (8 new today)

1. **Anomalous Hall Effect Driven by Chiral Superconductivity**  
   The study focuses on chiral superconductors, employing a proposed zero-field Hall drag effect to address the scarcity of direct dc-current signatures for unconventional pairing.

2. **Triplon-mediated pairing and the superconducting gap structure in bilayer nickelates**  
   The study focuses on bilayer nickelates, employing a model with coexisting conduction bands and localized spins to address how virtual singlet-triplet excitations ("triplons") mediate interband s+- pairing.

3. **Experimental demonstration of non-local magic in a superconducting quantum processor**  
   The study focuses on a superconducting quantum processing unit, employing optimal local-erasure and direct protocols to address the first experimental demonstration of non-local magic.

4. **Nitrogen-doped W0.75Re0.25 Superconducting Nanowire Single Photon Detectors**  
   The study focuses on nitrogen-doped Tungsten-Rhenium superconducting alloys, employing fabrication and characterization of thin-film nanowire detectors to address the material's balance between high resistivity and tunable superconducting properties for SNSPDs.

5. **Improvement of Heat-Treated Niobium Surface by In-situ Plasma Treatment Applied to Superconducting RF Resonator**  
   The study focuses on niobium surfaces in superconducting radio-frequency cavities, employing in-situ plasma treatment to address surface contamination issues that arise after medium-temperature baking (Mid-T baking).

6. **Thermodynamic Constraints on Perfect Equilibrium Superconducting Diodes**  
   The study focuses on equilibrium superconducting diodes, employing thermodynamic constraints to address why such platforms without engineered junctions typically exhibit modest rectification efficiencies.

7. **Magnetic Dipole in a Cuboidal Superconducting Trap**  
   The study focuses on a point dipole inside a closed cuboidal superconducting trap, employing an exact image-dipole potential construction to address the confinement of every translational degree of freedom while satisfying the Meissner boundary condition.

8. **Unconventional superconductivity in $A$V$_2X_2$O family of surface altermagnets**  
   The study focuses on the $A$V$_2X_2$O family of layered materials (e.g., Na$_{2-x}$V$_2$Se$_2$O), employing theoretical analysis of pairing instabilities to address the nature of superconductivity in systems believed to exhibit altermagnetic order in their monolayer form.

### spin glass (1 new today)

1. The study focuses on the two-dimensional Heisenberg spin-glass model, employing a semiclassical expansion around classical states to address the localization properties of spin-wave excitations and their transition from weak localization to hydrodynamic behavior.

| 1 | **[Anomalous Hall Effect Driven by Chiral Superconductivity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.31851v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Direct dc-current signatures of unconventional superconductivity remain scarce. Existing probes of unconventional pairing are typically indirect, relying on phase-diagram anomalies, responses to external fields, or optical measurements. Here we propose a zero-field Hall drag effect as a direct transport signature of chiral superconductivity. The effect arises from Coulomb drag between quasiparticles in a chiral superconductor and those in an adjacent time-reversal-symmetric normal layer. We develop a minimal hydrodynamic theory that includes both quasiparticle normal current and condensate supercurrent in the superconducting layer. In an open-circuit superconducting layer, the condensate generates a counterflowing supercurrent that cancels the net layer current, while a finite quasiparticle current remains and mediates the transverse drag response. This results in anomalous Hall voltage signal appearing abruptly when $T$ is lowered below $T_c$, of the sign reflecting the sign of the superconducting order parameter phase winding.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>非常规超导的直接直流电特征信号仍然稀少。现有的非常规配对探测手段通常是间接的，依赖于相图异常、对外部场的响应或光学测量。本文提出零场霍尔拖拽效应作为手性超导的直接输运特征信号。该效应源于手性超导体中的准粒子与相邻时间反演对称正常层中的准粒子之间的库仑拖拽。我们建立了一个最小流体动力学理论，该理论同时考虑了超导层中的准粒子正常电流和凝聚体超流。在开路超导层中，凝聚体产生反向流动的超流以抵消净层电流，而有限的准粒子电流仍然存在并介导横向拖拽响应。这导致当温度降至 \(T_c\) 以下时，反常霍尔电压信号突然出现，其符号反映了超导序参量相位缠绕的符号。</p></details> | 2026-06-30 | Vladislav Poliakov et al. |
| 2 | **[Triplon-mediated pairing and the superconducting gap structure in bilayer nickelates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.23989v4)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We investigate the superconducting gap structure in bilayer nickelates within a model in which conduction bands of dx2-y2 symmetry coexist with localized d3z2-r2 spins. Strong interlayer coupling drives the local moments into a singlet ground state, whose virtual singlet-triplet excitations ("triplons") mediate the pairing interaction. This mechanism yields interband s+- pairing, with opposite signs of the order parameter on the two (alpha and beta) bands. The calculated tunneling spectra reproduce the recently observed two-peak structure, the larger gap on the alpha band despite its smaller density of states, and the gap anisotropy. The results provide strong evidence for the triplon-mediated pairing mechanism in bilayer nickelates.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们在一个模型中研究了双层镍酸盐的超导能隙结构，该模型中 \(d_{x^2-y^2}\) 对称性的导带与局域的 \(d_{3z^2-r^2}\) 自旋共存。强层间耦合将局域矩驱动为单重态基态，其虚的单重态-三重态激发（“三重子”）介导了配对相互作用。该机制产生带间 \(s_\pm\) 配对，两个（\(\alpha\) 和 \(\beta\)）能带上的序参量符号相反。计算出的隧穿谱重现了最近观测到的双峰结构、\(\alpha\) 带上尽管态密度较小但能隙更大，以及能隙各向异性。这些结果为双层镍酸盐中三重子介导的配对机制提供了有力证据。</p></details> | 2026-06-30 | Huimei Liu et al. |
| 3 | **[Experimental demonstration of non-local magic in a superconducting quantum processor](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.15576v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Non-local magic is the non-stabilizerness that no local unitary operation can erase. It captures the joint action of entanglement and magic underlying quantum advantage, and it has never been measured on quantum hardware. Here we report its first experimental demonstration, on a superconducting quantum processing unit, through two independent routes: an optimal local-erasure protocol and a direct, state-agnostic measurement of subsystem purity. The two agree with each other and with theory. Exploiting direct access to the device, we construct a noise model with no free parameters that identifies readout error and a depolarizing controlled-Z channel as the dominant mechanisms, and we show that local and non-local magic can be addressed separately, erasing local magic in situ while preserving the non-local part. Non-local magic provides a hardware benchmark beyond standard gate-fidelity protocols and points toward more reliable pre-fault tolerant devices.The same tools underlie a purity-estimation protocol with exponential speedup and the decoding of Hawking radiation in a black-hole toy model.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>非局域魔法是无法被任何局域幺正操作擦除的非稳定化子性。它捕捉了量子优势背后纠缠与魔法的联合作用，且从未在量子硬件上被测量过。本文报告了其首次实验演示，在一个超导量子处理单元上，通过两条独立路径实现：一个最优局域擦除协议，以及一个直接的、与态无关的子系统纯度测量。两者彼此吻合，并与理论一致。利用对器件的直接访问，我们构建了一个无自由参数的噪声模型，识别出读出误差和退极化受控-Z 通道是主要机制，并展示了局域与非局域魔法可以分别处理，原位擦除局域魔法同时保留非局域部分。非局域魔法提供了一个超越标准门保真度协议的硬件基准，并指向更可靠的预容错器件。相同的工具支撑了具有指数加速的纯度估计协议以及黑洞玩具模型中霍金辐射的解码。</p></details> | 2026-06-30 | Halima Giovanna Ahmad et al. |
| 4 | **[Nitrogen-doped W0.75Re0.25 Superconducting Nanowire Single Photon Detectors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25597v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Nitrogen-doped Tungsten-Rhenium superconducting alloys were recently proposed as a promising material platform for superconducting nanowire single-photon detectors (SNSPDs), offering a favorable balance between high normal state resistivity and tunable superconducting properties. In this work, we report on the fabrication and characterization of SNSPDs based on thin W0.75Re0.25 films deposited by reactive DC magnetron sputtering in a mixed Ar/N2 atmosphere. Meander detectors with 70 nm linewidth exhibit saturated internal detection efficiency (IDE) up to 1310 nm and 85.3% IDE at 1550 nm at 2.5 K, with sub-nanosecond rise times, decay times of the order of a few nanoseconds, and timing jitter of 73.2 ps measured with room temperature amplifiers.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>掺氮钨铼超导合金最近被提出作为超导纳米线单光子探测器（SNSPDs）的一种有前景的材料平台，在高正常态电阻率与可调超导特性之间提供了有利的平衡。本工作中，我们报告了基于在 Ar/N₂ 混合气氛中通过反应直流磁控溅射沉积的薄 W₀.₇₅Re₀.₂₅ 薄膜的 SNSPD 的制备与表征。线宽为 70 nm 的曲折型探测器在 2.5 K 下表现出直至 1310 nm 的饱和内探测效率（IDE），在 1550 nm 处 IDE 为 85.3%，具有亚纳秒上升时间、数纳秒量级的衰减时间，以及使用室温放大器测量的 73.2 ps 时间抖动。</p></details> | 2026-06-30 | F. Colangelo et al. |
| 5 | **[Improvement of Heat-Treated Niobium Surface by In-situ Plasma Treatment Applied to Superconducting RF Resonator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.12091v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>A specific heat treatment at 300 C, named medium-temperature baking (Mid-T baking) is applied to superconducting radio-frequency (SRF) accelerating cavities to improve the quality factor (Qo) at medium accelerating fields (10 to 20 MV/m). This treatment is very successful when done properly as it can reduce by almost a factor of two the power dissipations in this field range. However, surface contamination can lead to the degradation of Qo instead. Plasma-based surface treatment provides an effective approach to eliminate contaminants from the Niobium surface. In this study an insitu plasma cleaning process with argon containing 10 % O2 was performed to remove hydrocarbons from Niobium surface. The treatment was applied before and after a heat treatment at 500 C under ultra-high vacuum conditions (Mid-T baking). Changes in chemical speciation and oxide layer alteration induced by plasma processing were analyzed using insitu X-ray photoelectron spectroscopy (XPS) and exsitu scanning electron microscopy (SEM). The results show that plasma treatment modifies the composition of Niobium oxides, converting a Nb2O5 layer into NbO2. Furthermore, a plasma treatment before Mid-T baking helps reduce unstable oxides such as NbxO and significantly increases the proportion of metallic Niobium at the surface. The Niobium sample treated by plasma prior to Mid-T baking showed a 53 % reduction in carbide formation. Moreover, the C1s component attributed to NbC bonds shifts toward lower binding energy, indicating the formation of a more metallic NbC phase. Whereas without plasma treatment, the higher binding energy component observed after Mid T baking is consistent with Nb2C.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>一种名为中温烘烤（Mid-T baking）的 300°C 特殊热处理被应用于超导射频（SRF）加速腔，以提升中等加速场（10 至 20 MV/m）下的品质因子（\(Q_0\)）。该处理在正确实施时非常成功，可将该场范围内的功率耗散降低近一半。然而，表面污染反而会导致 \(Q_0\) 的退化。基于等离子体的表面处理提供了一种有效的方法来消除铌表面的污染物。本研究中，采用含 10% O₂ 的氩气进行原位等离子体清洗过程，以去除铌表面的碳氢化合物。该处理在超高真空条件下 500°C 热处理（中温烘烤）前后分别进行。利用原位 X 射线光电子能谱（XPS）和非原位扫描电子显微镜（SEM）分析了等离子体处理引起的化学形态变化和氧化层改变。结果表明，等离子体处理改变了铌氧化物的组成，将 Nb₂O₅ 层转化为 NbO₂。此外，在中温烘烤前进行等离子体处理有助于减少如 NbₓO 等不稳定的氧化物，并显著增加表面金属铌的比例。在中温烘烤前经过等离子体处理的铌样品，其碳化物形成减少了 53%。而且，归因于 NbC 键的 C1s 组分向更低结合能移动，表明形成了更具金属性的 NbC 相。而无等离子体处理时，中温烘烤后观察到的更高结合能组分则与 Nb₂C 一致。</p></details> | 2026-06-29 | C. Boutelaa et al. |
| 6 | **[Thermodynamic Constraints on Perfect Equilibrium Superconducting Diodes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.21384v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting diodes promise dissipationless rectification, yet equilibrium platforms without engineered junctions typically exhibit modest efficiencies. We identify a general thermodynamic origin of this behavior that is largely independent of microscopic details. Denoting $ε= |I_c^-/I_c^+|$, where $I_c^\pm$ are critical currents in opposite directions with $|I_c^+|>|I_c^-|$ by convention, we show that an exact perfect equilibrium diode ($ε=0$) is forbidden by continuity of the free energy. Asymptotically perfect behavior $ε\to0$ is possible within a global equilibrium description, but requires free-energy singularities to enable softening of the unfavorable current-carrying branch. We demonstrate this explicitly in an exactly solvable Ising superconductor model. For smooth single-branch superconductors, standard finite-order polynomial Landau theory yields finite lower bounds on $ε$, while Josephson systems obey analogous bounds set by finite harmonic content of the current-phase relation. The high efficiencies often reported in Josephson platforms arise because such devices commonly operate under phase constraints, metastable switching, or external drive, thereby evading unconstrained equilibrium limits. Thus, our results provide a unified framework for interpreting diode efficiencies across superconducting platforms.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导二极管有望实现无耗散整流，然而，无工程结的平衡平台通常效率较低。我们识别出这种行为的一个普遍热力学起源，该起源在很大程度上与微观细节无关。记 $ε= |I_c^-/I_c^+|$，其中 $I_c^\pm$ 是相反方向的临界电流，按惯例 $|I_c^+|>|I_c^-|$，我们证明，自由能的连续性禁止了完美的平衡二极管（$ε=0$）。在全局平衡描述中，渐近完美行为 $ε\to0$ 是可能的，但这需要自由能奇点来软化不利的载流分支。我们在一个精确可解的伊辛超导体模型中明确展示了这一点。对于光滑的单分支超导体，标准有限阶多项式朗道理论给出了 $ε$ 的有限下界，而约瑟夫森系统则遵循由电流-相位关系有限谐波含量设定的类似界限。约瑟夫森平台中常报道的高效率，是因为此类器件通常在相位约束、亚稳态切换或外部驱动下运行，从而规避了无约束的平衡极限。因此，我们的结果为跨超导平台解释二极管效率提供了一个统一框架。</p></details> | 2026-06-29 | Pavan Hosur et al. |
| 7 | **[Magnetic Dipole in a Cuboidal Superconducting Trap](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30808v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We derive the exact image-dipole potential of a point dipole inside a closed cuboidal superconducting trap. The construction generalises the parallel-plate result to a geometry that confines every translational degree of freedom, and we prove that the image lattice satisfies the Meissner boundary condition on all six walls. For a centred dipole the orientational energy reduces to a diagonal quadratic form whose three coefficients are Epstein-zeta-type lattice sums. We show that in both the infinite and finite rectangular traps the dipole orientation aligns with the \emph{short} cross-sectional axis over a finite range of aspect ratios. The equilibrium orientation in both cases is described by a phase diagram whose degeneracies we classify. Every prediction is verified against finite-element solutions of the same boundary-value problem, with agreement better than $0.16\%$.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们推导了封闭长方体超导陷阱内点偶极子的精确镜像偶极势。该构造将平行板结果推广到约束所有平动自由度的几何结构，并证明了镜像晶格在所有六个壁面上均满足迈斯纳边界条件。对于中心偶极子，取向能简化为对角二次型，其三个系数是 Epstein-zeta 型晶格求和。我们证明，在无限和有限矩形陷阱中，偶极子取向在一定的纵横比范围内均与短截面轴对齐。两种情况下的平衡取向均由一个相图描述，我们对其简并性进行了分类。每个预测均通过与同一边值问题的有限元解进行验证，一致性优于 0.16%。</p></details> | 2026-06-29 | Francis J. Headley et al. |
| 8 | **[Unconventional superconductivity in $A$V$_2X_2$O family of surface altermagnets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30766v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Motivated by the recent discovery of superconductivity at 16.3 K in layered oxychalcogenide Na$_{2-x}$V$_2$Se$_2$O we investigate pairing instabilities in the broader family of layered materials composed of V$_2$O planes, believed to exhibit altermagnetic order in their monolayer form. Even though the bulk family members KV$_2$Se$_2$O and Rb$_{1-δ}$V$_{2}$Te$_{2}$O are likely conventional antiferromagnets that show only surface altermagnetism, our analysis predicts exotic equal-spin triplet superconductivity as the dominant pairing instability in these materials. This is a consequence of their unique magnetic and sublattice structure that renders electron bands incompatible with conventional spin-singlet pairing. The predicted triplet superconducting phases are topologically non-trivial and capable of supporting spin-polarized persistent currents, properties potentially useful in technological applications.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>受最近在层状氧硫族化物 Na$_{2-x}$V$_2$Se$_2$O 中发现 16.3 K 超导电性的启发，我们研究了由 V$_2$O 平面组成的更广泛层状材料家族中的配对不稳定性，这些材料被认为在其单层形式中表现出交变磁序。尽管块体家族成员 KV$_2$Se$_2$O 和 Rb$_{1-δ}$V$_{2}$Te$_{2}$O 可能是仅显示表面交变磁性的传统反铁磁体，但我们的分析预测，在这些材料中，奇异的等自旋三重态超导电性是主导的配对不稳定性。这是其独特的磁性和子晶格结构的结果，该结构使得电子能带与传统的自旋单态配对不相容。所预测的三重态超导相在拓扑上非平凡，并且能够支持自旋极化的持续电流，这些特性可能在技术应用中具有潜在用途。</p></details> | 2026-06-29 | M. Franz et al. |
| 9 | **[Ultrasound Evidence for a Low-Temperature Anomaly Inside the Superconducting State of 4Hb-TaS$_2$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30502v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We report low-temperature ultrasound measurements on single crystals of the layered van der Waals superconductor 4Hb-TaS$_2$. Specific heat and ac magnetic susceptibility show a sharp bulk superconducting transition at $T_{\rm c}\approx 2.9$~K. Ultrasound measurements reveal an additional anomaly deep inside the superconducting state near $T^{*}\approx 1$~K. The most direct signature is observed in the relative ultrasonic attenuation change $Δα$: instead of being rapidly suppressed at $T_{\rm c}$, $Δα$ remains large throughout the intermediate superconducting regime and drops strongly only near $T^{*}$. This loss of acoustic dissipation is accompanied by a pronounced anomaly in the relative sound velocity change $Δv/v$, indicating strong coupling to the lattice. The low-temperature anomaly is rapidly suppressed by magnetic field and by Se substitution, suggesting a possible superconducting origin of the anomaly. We speculate that this feature may be related to induced superconductivity in the 1T layers.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们报道了层状范德瓦尔斯超导体4Hb-TaS₂单晶的低温超声测量结果。比热和交流磁化率显示在$T_{\rm c}\approx 2.9$~K处存在尖锐的体超导转变。超声测量揭示在超导态内部靠近$T^{*}\approx 1$~K处存在额外异常。最直接的标志体现在相对超声衰减变化$Δα$中：$Δα$并未在$T_{\rm c}$处被迅速抑制，而是在中间超导区间保持较大值，仅在$T^{*}$附近急剧下降。这种声耗散的消失伴随着相对声速变化$Δv/v$的显著异常，表明与晶格存在强耦合。该低温异常可被磁场和硒替代迅速抑制，提示该异常可能源于超导。我们推测这一特征可能与1T层中的感应超导有关。</p></details> | 2026-06-29 | Yongwei Li et al. |
| 10 | **[Condensate Fraction Scaling and Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless Transition of Superconductivity and Superfluidity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.17411v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Characterizing the superconducting and superfluid transitions in two-dimensional (2D) many-body systems is of broad interest and remains a fundamental issue. In this study, we establish the {\it condensate fraction} scaling as a highly efficient tool to achieve that and accordingly propose efficient schemes to accurately determine the associated Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless (BKT) transitions. Using the 2D attractive Fermi-Hubbard model as a testbed and applying numerically exact auxiliary-field quantum Monte Carlo simulations, we access unprecedented system sizes (up to $64\times 64 = 4096$ lattice sites) and perform a comprehensive analysis for the temperature dependence and finite-size scaling of {\it condensate fraction} across the BKT transition. We demonstrate that this quantity exhibits algebraic scaling below the transition and exponential scaling above it, with significantly reduced finite-size effects comparing to the extensively studied on-site pairing correlator. This greatly improves the determination of BKT transition using moderate system sizes. We also extract finite-size BKT transition temperature from condensate fraction, and confirm its logarithmic correction on system size. Based on the accurately determined transition, we reveal that the specific heat displays an anomaly, showing a peak at a temperature slightly above BKT transition. Our findings should be generally applicable to 2D fermionic and bosonic systems hosting superconductivity or superfluidity.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>表征二维多体系统中的超导和超流转变具有广泛意义，且仍是一个基本问题。在本研究中，我们建立了{\it 凝聚分数}标度作为实现这一目标的高效工具，并据此提出精确确定相关Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless (BKT) 转变的有效方案。以二维吸引性费米-哈伯德模型为测试平台，并应用数值精确的辅助场量子蒙特卡洛模拟，我们达到了前所未有的系统尺寸（高达$64\times 64 = 4096$个格点），并对BKT转变前后的{\it 凝聚分数}进行了温度依赖性和有限尺寸标度的全面分析。我们证明该量在转变以下呈现代数标度，在转变以上呈现指数标度，且与广泛研究的在位配对关联函数相比，其有限尺寸效应显著减小。这极大地改进了使用中等系统尺寸确定BKT转变的精度。我们还从凝聚分数中提取了有限尺寸BKT转变温度，并确认了其对系统尺寸的对数修正。基于精确确定的转变，我们揭示了比热存在异常，在略高于BKT转变的温度处出现峰值。我们的发现应普遍适用于存在超导或超流的二维费米子和玻色子系统。</p></details> | 2026-06-29 | Yuan-Yao He et al. |
| 11 | **[Design Method of Quasi-Lumped Element Bandpass Filters Using Superconducting Coplanar Waveguide for Millimeter-Wave Multichroic Imaging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29790v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>An on-chip band-defining filter coupled with a superconducting photon detector is a promising technology for developing multi-band imaging cameras at millimeter and submillimeter wavelengths. In this paper, we present the design of on-chip bandpass filters based on coplanar waveguide geometry, which can be easily integrated into large-format multi-band detector arrays. A lumped element filter design is suitable not only for achieving a compact footprint but also for suppressing harmonics to reduce band-to-band crosstalk in a multiplexer. However, the coplanar waveguide geometry and the photolithography process rule limit the maximum available inductance and capacitance of lumped elements, which does not sufficiently meet the requirements of filter circuits. To overcome this limitation, we have established a design method for quasi-lumped element filters, in which the maximum element size is relaxed to a quarter wavelength, exceeding the ideal lumped element size. We achieved design solutions for 150, 220, and 270 GHz 8th-order Chebyshev bandpass filters and a triplexer. We also report on the measurement results of a scaled model of the bandpass filter, demonstrating the validity of our proposed filter design.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>与超导光子探测器集成的片上波段定义滤波器，是开发毫米和亚毫米波段多波段成像相机的一项有前景的技术。本文中，我们介绍了基于共面波导几何结构的片上带通滤波器设计，该设计可轻松集成到大面积多波段探测器阵列中。集总元件滤波器设计不仅适用于实现紧凑的占地面积，还适用于抑制谐波以减少多路复用器中的波段间串扰。然而，共面波导几何结构和光刻工艺规则限制了集总元件的最大可用电感和电容，这不足以满足滤波器电路的要求。为克服这一限制，我们建立了一种准集总元件滤波器的设计方法，其中最大元件尺寸放宽至四分之一波长，超过了理想集总元件尺寸。我们实现了150、220和270 GHz的8阶切比雪夫带通滤波器及三工器的设计方案。我们还报告了带通滤波器缩比模型的测量结果，证明了我们提出的滤波器设计的有效性。</p></details> | 2026-06-29 | Shinsuke Uno et al. |
| 12 | **[Unconventional Superconductivity in the Chiral Topological Semimetal Ag2Pd3S](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29767v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Chiral crystals provide a unique setting where broken inversion symmetry, strong spin-orbit coupling, and electronic topology intertwine, yet superconductivity in intrinsically chiral materials remains rare. Here, we report unconventional superconductivity in the chiral topological semimetal Ag$_2$Pd$_3$S, an enantiomorphic analog of natural mineral coldwellite, crystallizing in the right-handed space group $P4_132$. Bulk superconductivity with a transition temperature $T_C = 1.1(2)$ K is confirmed by electrical resistivity, magnetization, and specific-heat measurements. Muon spin rotation and relaxation ($μ$SR) experiments reveal a fully gapped superconducting state that spontaneously time-reversal symmetry (TRS) breaking establishing Ag$_2$Pd$_3$S as the first chiral topological semimetal superconductor exhibiting intrinsic TRS breaking. First-principles calculations uncover multiple multifold band crossings near the Fermi level, hosting Kramers-Weyl, double spin-1, and spin-3/2 quasiparticles with large topological charges. These unconventional fermions generate symmetry-protected topological surface states and underscore the nontrivial topology of the normal state. Symmetry analysis based on the Ginzburg-Landau theory suggests a loop-supercurrent-ordered superconducting state, yielding a full gap alongside spontaneous TRS breaking. The coexistence of TRS-breaking superconductivity and chiral multifold fermions identifies Ag$_2$Pd$_3$S as a platform for realizing intrinsic superconducting diode effects and chirality-induced spin selectivity, offering a transformative pathway toward dissipationless topological quantum technologies.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>手性晶体提供了一个独特的平台，其中破缺的反演对称性、强自旋-轨道耦合和电子拓扑相互交织，然而在本质手性材料中的超导性仍然罕见。在此，我们报道了手性拓扑半金属Ag₂Pd₃S中的非常规超导性，该材料是天然矿物冷硫钯矿的对映异构类似物，结晶于右手空间群$P4_132$。通过电阻率、磁化率和比热测量，确认了转变温度$T_C = 1.1(2)$ K的体超导性。μ子自旋旋转与弛豫实验揭示了一个完全能隙的超导态，该态自发破缺时间反演对称性，使Ag₂Pd₃S成为首个展现本征时间反演对称性破缺的手性拓扑半金属超导体。第一性原理计算揭示了费米能级附近的多个多重能带交叉，承载具有大拓扑荷的克莱默斯-外尔、双自旋-1和自旋-3/2准粒子。这些非常规费米子产生了对称性保护的拓扑表面态，并强调了正常态的非平庸拓扑。基于金兹堡-朗道理论的对称性分析表明存在一个环超流有序的超导态，在产生完全能隙的同时伴随自发时间反演对称性破缺。时间反演对称性破缺超导性与手性多重费米子的共存，将Ag₂Pd₃S确立为实现本征超导二极管效应和手性诱导自旋选择性的平台，为迈向无耗散拓扑量子技术提供了一条变革性路径。</p></details> | 2026-06-29 | Roshan Kumar Kushwaha et al. |
| 13 | **[Pattern recognition with superconducting wirelet neurons](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.14330v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Neuromorphic computing aims to reproduce the energy efficiency and adaptability of biological intelligence in hardware. Superconducting devices are an attractive platform due to their ultra-low dissipation and fast switching dynamics. Here we employ a resistively shunted superconducting wirelet as a minimal artificial neuron for temporal neuromorphic computation. This simple architecture enables straightforward fabrication, electronic control, and high scalability. Through experiments and advanced simulations, we show that it exhibits spiking voltage dynamics driven by the interplay of resistive switching and relaxation, with threshold, firing frequency, and refractory time tunable through applied current, temperature, and shunt resistance. We demonstrate neural network operation by synaptically training temporal voltage signals generated by individual neurons. In this approach, trainable temporal weights act directly on the time-dependent wirelet-neuron responses rather than on static neuron outputs alone, allowing the computation to exploit the full temporal structure of the superconducting spikes. As an illustrative example, we apply this framework to handwritten digit recognition and show accurate classification using only three superconducting wirelet neurons. We further discuss on-chip training based on related gated wirelets as tunable synaptic elements, establishing shunted superconducting wirelets as scalable, energy-efficient building blocks for cryogenic artificial intelligence hardware that can be integrated with other emerging superconducting technologies.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>神经形态计算旨在硬件中复现生物智能的能量效率和适应性。超导器件因其超低耗散和快速开关动力学而成为一个有吸引力的平台。在此，我们采用一个带电阻分流的超导细线作为用于时间性神经形态计算的最小化人工神经元。这种简单的架构便于制造、电子控制和高可扩展性。通过实验和先进模拟，我们展示了其展现出由阻性开关与弛豫相互作用驱动的尖峰电压动力学，其阈值、发放频率和不应期可通过施加电流、温度和分流电阻进行调节。我们通过突触训练单个神经元产生的时间性电压信号，演示了神经网络操作。在这种方法中，可训练的时间性权重直接作用于与时间相关的细线-神经元响应，而非仅作用于静态神经元输出，从而使计算能够充分利用超导尖峰的完整时间结构。作为一个说明性示例，我们将此框架应用于手写数字识别，并展示了仅使用三个超导细线神经元即可实现准确分类。我们进一步讨论了基于相关门控细线作为可调突触元件的片上训练，确立了带分流超导细线作为可扩展、节能的低温人工智能硬件基本构建单元，并可与其他新兴超导技术集成。</p></details> | 2026-06-28 | Khalil Harrabi et al. |
| 14 | **[A superconducting qutrit link beyond the qubit limit](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29475v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting microwave links have enabled deterministic state transfer and remote entanglement between qubits, but deterministic links have so far operated with an effectively two-dimensional transmitted Hilbert space. Here we demonstrate a superconducting qutrit link between two independently packaged nodes connected by a microwave channel. Each node combines a transmon qutrit, a transmission resonator, and a tunable Purcell-filter interface, allowing the two remote microwave-photon interfaces to be matched in both frequency and bandwidth. We implement two transition-selective photon-mediated operations that transfer the $|e\rangle$ and $|f\rangle$ qutrit components in distinct temporal modes of the same channel. We tomographically characterize arbitrary qutrit-state transfer, obtaining a mean transferred-state fidelity of 83.68% and a qutrit process fidelity of 77.12%, exceeding both the classical qutrit-transfer benchmark and the best possible average fidelity of an effective qubit channel used to transmit an arbitrary qutrit. Using partial-transfer operations, we reconstruct a remote two-qutrit state with negativity 0.730, a tomography-inferred dense-coding capacity of 2.273 bits, and a tomography-inferred Collins-Gisin-Linden-Massar-Popescu (CGLMP) parameter $I_3=2.332$, all beyond the corresponding qubit or local bounds. These results demonstrate a superconducting microwave link that uses the native three-level structure of transmons as a genuine high-dimensional communication resource.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导微波链路已实现量子比特间的确定性态转移与远程纠缠，但迄今为止确定性链路仅在有效二维希尔伯特空间中运行。本文演示了通过微波信道连接的两个独立封装节点间的超导qutrit链路。每个节点包含一个transmon qutrit、一个传输谐振器和一个可调谐Purcell滤波接口，使得两个远程微波-光子接口在频率和带宽上均可匹配。我们实现了两种跃迁选择性光子介导操作，将$|e\rangle$和$|f\rangle$ qutrit分量转移至同一信道的不同时间模式中。通过层析成像表征任意qutrit态转移，获得平均转移态保真度83.68%和qutrit过程保真度77.12%，超过经典qutrit转移基准以及用于传输任意qutrit的有效量子比特信道的最大可能平均保真度。利用部分转移操作，我们重构了远程两qutrit态，其负性度为0.730，层析推断密集编码容量为2.273比特，层析推断Collins-Gisin-Linden-Massar-Popescu（CGLMP）参数$I_3=2.332$，均超越相应量子比特或局域界限。这些结果证明超导微波链路可将transmon的天然三能级结构作为真正的高维通信资源加以利用。</p></details> | 2026-06-28 | Xiang Li et al. |
| 15 | **[Superconductivity in Jellium Model Revisited](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29306v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We reanalyze superconductivity in jellium model within the dielectric formalism developed by Kirzhnits, Maksimov, and Khomskii (KMK), which is probably the most reliable approach to this model. The linearized KMK integral equation for superconducting transition temperature is analyzed analytically and solved numerically by direct diagonalization to obtain $T_c$ dependence on Wigner - Seitz radius $r_s$. As a first systematic extension beyond random - phase approximation (RPA), static Hubbard local - field corrections are incorporated into the dielectric function. Our results in general narrow the interval of possible $T_c$ values in comparison with widely scattered results of some of the previous works. For the case of metallic hydrogen our calculations show $T_c(r_s)$ dependence with characteristic dome with maximum of $T_c$ at $r_s\sim$ 9.0 of the order of some fractions of Kelvin only, despite the naive expectations based on the high values of pairing Boson frequency. This is due to the weak - coupling regime of superconductivity in jellium model at all densities.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们在Kirzhnits、Maksimov和Khomskii（KMK）发展的介电形式框架内重新分析了凝胶模型中的超导电性，该形式可能是处理此模型最可靠的方法。通过解析分析和直接对角化数值求解线性化KMK积分方程，获得了超导转变温度$T_c$对Wigner-Seitz半径$r_s$的依赖关系。作为超越随机相位近似（RPA）的首个系统性扩展，我们将静态Hubbard局域场修正纳入介电函数。与先前部分工作中分散的结果相比，我们的结果总体上缩小了$T_c$可能值的区间。对于金属氢情形，计算显示$T_c(r_s)$呈现特征穹顶依赖关系，最大$T_c$出现在$r_s\sim$ 9.0处，仅达开尔文量级几分之一，这与基于配对玻色子高频的朴素预期相悖。这是由于凝胶模型在所有密度下均处于超导弱耦合区间。</p></details> | 2026-06-28 | Michael V. Sadovskii et al. |
| 16 | **[Time-local nonequilibrium Green's function method for real-time dynamics in quantum systems coupled to superconducting leads](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29266v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We develop a time-local nonequilibrium Green's function formulation for real-time dynamics in quantum systems coupled to superconducting leads. The superconducting lead self-energy is a strongly frequency-dependent matrix in Nambu space, giving rise to nonlocal memory kernels in the time domain. This makes direct propagation of the Kadanoff-Baym (KB) equations computationally demanding. To overcome this difficulty, we extend the auxiliary-mode expansion, originally developed for normal-metal leads, to Nambu-space self-energies. This allows us to decompose the superconducting lead self-energy into a finite number of exponential modes and to transform the KB equations with memory integrals into a closed set of ordinary differential equations. The resulting time-local equations enable efficient real-time simulations under general time-dependent bias voltages, superconducting phases, and one-body Hamiltonians of the central system, while retaining the memory effects induced by superconducting leads. As an application, we analyze voltage-quench dynamics in a superconductor-quantum-dot-superconductor junction and show that, after a dc bias is suddenly applied, the system evolves through a transient regime and relaxes to an ac Josephson periodic steady state. The resulting periodic steady-state current agrees with the Floquet Green's function solution, validating the present real-time formulation.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们发展了用于耦合超导引线量子系统实时动力学的时间局域非平衡格林函数形式。超导引线自能是Nambu空间中强频率依赖的矩阵，在时域中产生非定域记忆核，这使得直接传播Kadanoff-Baym（KB）方程计算代价高昂。为克服此困难，我们将最初针对正常金属引线发展的辅助模展开方法扩展至Nambu空间自能。这使我们能够将超导引线自能分解为有限数量的指数模，并将含记忆积分的KB方程转化为封闭的常微分方程组。所得时间局域方程可在一般时变偏压、超导相位和中心系统单体哈密顿量下实现高效实时模拟，同时保留超导引线诱导的记忆效应。作为应用，我们分析了超导体-量子点-超导体结中的电压猝灭动力学，表明在突然施加直流偏压后，系统经历瞬态过程并弛豫至交流约瑟夫森周期稳态。所得周期稳态电流与Floquet格林函数解一致，验证了本实时形式的有效性。</p></details> | 2026-06-28 | Taira Kawamura et al. |
| 17 | **[A chemical avenue to manipulate field-reentrant superconducting rivalries in infinite layer nickelates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.22026v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Recently, preliminary magnetic field-reentrant superconductivity manifested in high-temperature (Tc) Eu-doped infinite-layer (IL) nickelates, beyond analogous discoveries exclusively in low-Tc systems. This evokes intriguing fundamental issues about potential quantum-phase boundary and criticality between unconventional superconductivity and field-reentrant-one, which are inexplicable owing to formidable challenges in growing IL-nickelates towards later-series rare-earths. Herein, we open up chemical avenues to enable effective growth of (RE1-yRE'y)1-xEuxNiO2 (RE/RE': Pr, Nd, Sm, Gd, Dy), giving rise to discoveries of RE-4f-related quantum competition between high-Tc and reentrant superconductivity. Robust magnetic-field-reentrant superconductivity with uniaxial anisotropy is observed at superconducting-dome boundaries, stemming from Eu2+-4f7 associated competition between magnetic-fluctuation promoted pairing and exchange-field interactions. Their quantum-criticality is further modulable via RE(RE')-magnetism, which either reinforces reentrancy or elevates Tc (40.1 K) with more robust critical-current-density (~266 kA/cm2 at 2 K) beyond Sr-/Ca-doped counterparts. Our synthetic route enables the establishment of an ideal platform via IL-nickelates for studying 4f-related unconventional superconductivity and quantum-criticality.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>近期，高温（Tc）Eu掺杂无限层（IL）镍酸盐中初步展现出磁场可重入超导电性，超越了此前仅在低温Tc系统中的类似发现。这引发了关于非常规超导与场致重入超导之间潜在量子相边界与临界性的基础问题，但由于生长后期稀土系列IL镍酸盐面临巨大挑战，这些现象尚无法解释。本文开辟了化学途径以实现（RE1-yRE'y）1-xEuxNiO2（RE/RE'：Pr、Nd、Sm、Gd、Dy）的有效生长，从而发现了与RE-4f相关的高Tc与重入超导之间的量子竞争。在超导穹顶边界处观察到具有单轴各向异性的稳健磁场重入超导电性，其源于Eu2+-4f7关联的磁涨落促进配对与交换场相互作用之间的竞争。其量子临界性可通过RE（RE'）磁性进一步调控，该磁性或增强重入性，或提升Tc（40.1 K）并具有更稳健的临界电流密度（2 K下约266 kA/cm²），超越Sr/Ca掺杂对应物。我们的合成路线通过IL镍酸盐为研究4f相关非常规超导与量子临界性建立了理想平台。</p></details> | 2026-06-28 | Haowen Han et al. |
| 18 | **[Theory of High-Tc Superconductivity in Cuprates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28906v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The essential physical processes underlying the phenomenon of High-Tc superconductivity in cuprates occur in the $CuO_2$ planes, found in these materials. The dynamics of the active electrons belonging to such planes is well described by the Three Bands Hubbard Model (3BHM). The complexity of such model, however, led the researchers to look for simpler and yet relevant alternatives. In the attempts to circumvent the complexity of this model,two main simplified versions of the (3BHM) were considered. In the first alternative, one eliminates the doped holes and their respective sub-lattices by tying them to the $Cu^{++}$ electrons, thereby forming the so called Zhang-Rice singlets. The remaining dynamics consists in doping a Mott-Hubbard insulator and is described by the t-J Model. The second alternative maintains that the $Cu^{++}$ electrons form a square lattice of localized spins, while the doped holes move along the oxygen sub-lattices and undergo a Kondo like magnetic interaction with the localized spins, besides the Hubbard-like electric repulsion. This scenario is described by the Spin-Fermion-Hubbard Model. Most of the researchers in the field chose to follow the first road, while, I chose the second one. In this article I review in detail the reasons why that choice has led to a successful theory for High-Tc superconductivity in hole doped cuprates.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>铜氧化物高温超导现象的基本物理过程发生在这些材料中的$CuO_2$面内。描述这些面内活性电子动力学的有效模型是三带Hubbard模型（3BHM）。然而该模型的复杂性促使研究者寻找更简单且仍具相关性的替代方案。在规避此模型复杂性的尝试中，主要考虑了3BHM的两种简化版本。第一种方案通过将掺杂空穴及其子晶格束缚于$Cu^{++}$电子形成所谓的Zhang-Rice单态，从而消除它们。剩余动力学描述的是掺杂Mott-Hubbard绝缘体，由t-J模型刻画。第二种方案认为$Cu^{++}$电子形成局域自旋的方晶格，而掺杂空穴沿氧子晶格运动，除Hubbard型电排斥外，还与局域自旋发生近藤型磁相互作用。此场景由自旋-费米子-Hubbard模型描述。该领域多数研究者选择第一条路径，而我选择了第二条。本文详细回顾了为何这一选择导向了空穴掺杂铜氧化物高温超导的成功理论。</p></details> | 2026-06-27 | E. C. Marino et al. |
| 19 | **[Multi-level π-junction in a proximitized Ge/SiGe quantum dot probed by an on-chip superconducting microwave resonator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28762v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Using on-chip microwave measurements, we investigate multilevel $π$-junctions formed by proximitized quantum dot (QD) in a germanium (Ge)/silicon-germanium (SiGe) heterostructure. In the multilevel regime, where several QD orbitals contribute simultaneously to superconducting transport, the Josephson ground state is no longer determined solely by the occupation of a single orbital. By combining DC transport and microwave techniques, we identify the qualitative signatures of multilevel $π$-junctions in both their gate-voltage dependence and microwave response. In particular, we observe combinations phase transitions that are sharp or smooth in gate voltage and which exhibit distinct inductive and dissipative signatures. Such multilevel Josephson transport has previously been observed primarily in exceptionally clean systems such as carbon nanotubes. Our results establish proximitized Ge as a platform for investigating hybrid superconductor/semiconductor physics and demonstrate the integration of gate-defined superconducting quantum devices with high-quality on-chip microwave resonators.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们利用片上微波测量技术，研究了锗/硅锗异质结构中由邻近效应诱导的量子点形成的多能级π结。在多能级体系中，多个量子点轨道同时参与超导输运，此时约瑟夫森基态不再仅由单个轨道的占据数决定。通过结合直流输运与微波技术，我们识别出多能级π结在栅压依赖性和微波响应中的定性特征。特别地，我们观察到栅压变化下呈现尖锐或平滑的相变组合，并表现出独特的电感和耗散特征。此类多能级约瑟夫森输运此前主要见于碳纳米管等极端洁净系统。我们的研究结果确立了邻近效应诱导的锗作为研究超导/半导体混合物理的平台，并展示了将栅极定义超导量子器件与高品质片上微波谐振器集成的可行性。</p></details> | 2026-06-27 | Luigi Ruggiero et al. |

### spin glass

| **#** | **Title** | **Abstract** | **Date** | **Authors** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | **[Semiclassical picture of the Heisenberg spin glass in two dimensions: from weak localization to hydrodynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22077v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The two-dimensional Heisenberg spin-glass model is investigated by means of a semiclassical expansion around classical states. At leading order, we obtain an effective quadratic spin-wave Hamiltonian and study the localization properties of its spectrum and eigenfunctions. We find that the nature of the spin-wave excitations, whether they are hydrodynamic or localized modes, depends crucially on the relevance/irrelevance -- in the renormalization group sense -- of the correlations induced by the underlying classical order in the spin-wave Hamiltonian matrix elements: low-energy excitations around magnetically ordered states are delocalized, whereas those around spin-glass ordered states are localized, albeit weakly. We interpret this phenomenology by relating the spontaneous breaking of spin-rotation symmetry in the original Heisenberg model to the symmetry and universality class of the resulting quadratic spin-wave Hamiltonian. We conjecture that the hydrodynamic picture can be recovered through the inclusion of interactions among the spin-wave excitations at higher order in the semiclassical expansion, favoring the onset of ergodic behavior.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>本文通过经典态周围的半经典展开研究二维海森堡自旋玻璃模型。在主导阶近似下，我们获得了有效的二次自旋波哈密顿量，并研究了其谱与本征函数的局域化性质。研究发现，自旋波激发的性质（无论是流体动力学模式还是局域化模式）关键取决于自旋波哈密顿量矩阵元中由底层经典序所诱导关联的相关性/非相关性（以重整化群意义而言）：磁有序态周围的低能激发是非局域的，而自旋玻璃有序态周围的低能激发则是弱局域的。我们通过将原始海森堡模型中自旋旋转对称性的自发破缺与所得二次自旋波哈密顿量的对称性及普适类联系起来，对这一现象进行了解释。我们推测，通过在半经典展开的高阶项中纳入自旋波激发之间的相互作用，可以恢复流体动力学图像，从而促进遍历行为的出现。</p></details> | 2026-06-30 | Giacomo Bracci-Testasecca et al. |
| 2 | **[Local-Minima-Preserving Continuous Relaxation of Ising Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30333v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The generalized Ising problem captures a broad spectrum of hard combinatorial problems, including MAX-CUT, Number Partitioning (NPP), and Maximum Independent Set. In this work, we consider the notion of one-flip local minima for this problem. We construct a polynomial relaxation and prove the landscape equivalence theorem: there exists a one-to-one correspondence between the local minima of the relaxation and the one-flip minima of the original Ising problem. This guarantee reduces the Ising problem to finding the local minima of a smooth function, allowing us to leverage gradient-based optimizers such as ADAM. We demonstrate that our method is scalable and it achieves strong performance across challenging benchmarks, including spin-glass models, MAX-CUT, and NPP.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>广义伊辛问题涵盖了包括最大割、数分割问题和最大独立集在内的广泛难解组合问题。本文针对该问题考虑单翻转局部极小值的概念。我们构造了一个多项式松弛并证明了景观等价定理：松弛问题的局部极小值与原始伊辛问题的单翻转极小值之间存在一一对应关系。这一保证将伊辛问题简化为寻找光滑函数的局部极小值，从而允许我们利用基于梯度的优化器（如ADAM）。实验表明，该方法具有可扩展性，并在自旋玻璃模型、最大割和数分割问题等具有挑战性的基准测试中取得了优异性能。</p></details> | 2026-06-29 | Debraj Banerjee et al. |
| 3 | **[Estimates of ground state energies for the quantum SK and 2D-EA models, using deGennes-Suzuki-Kubo mean-field annealing dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29875v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We perform large scale quantum annealing of the Sherrington-Kirkpatrick (SK) spin glass up to a system size $N=40000$ to estimate its ground state energy using the deGennes-Suzuki-Kubo mean-field quantum Ising dynamics, extending the earlier results (reported in Eur. Phys. J. B {\bf 98}, 226 (2025)). Here we numerically solve the deGennes-Suzuki-Kubo annealing dynamics to obtain the spin configurations and subsequently the ground state energy for a given system size at the end of the annealing, starting from a quantum paramagnetic state. The method shows high efficiency, with an overall algorithmic cost of $O(N^3)$ in estimating the energy of the ground state. We later extend this quantum annealing study to estimate the ground state energies (starting again from the quantum paramagnetic phase, annealing down to any desired low value of the transverse field) for the Edwards-Anderson (EA) spin glass model on a square lattice.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们利用德热纳-铃木-久保平均场量子伊辛动力学，对系统规模达N=40000的谢林顿-柯克帕特里克自旋玻璃进行了大规模量子退火，以估算其基态能量，从而扩展了前期研究成果（发表于《欧洲物理杂志B》第98卷，226页，2025年）。本文通过数值求解德热纳-铃木-久保退火动力学，从量子顺磁态出发，获得退火结束时的自旋构型及对应系统规模的基态能量。该方法具有高效性，估算基态能量的总算法复杂度为O(N^3)。随后我们将该量子退火研究扩展至方格上的爱德华兹-安德森自旋玻璃模型（同样从量子顺磁相出发，退火至任意所需的低横向场值），以估算其基态能量。</p></details> | 2026-06-29 | Soumyaditya Das et al. |
| 4 | **[Critical Universality of the SU (2) Gauge Glass Model Analyzed by the Dynamical Scaling Method](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.25618v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We investigate the critical phenomena of the three-dimensional (3D) $SU(2)$ gauge glass model, which can be regarded as the $O(4)$ spin-glass model with gauge symmetry. Using Monte Carlo simulations and the non-equilibrium relaxation method, we examine the critical behavior along phase boundaries across various degrees of disorder. Consistent with previous studies, we verify that weak disorder is irrelevant to the universality class; the critical behavior of the ferromagnetic-paramagnetic transition remains in the 3D $O(4)$ universality class of the pure ferromagnetic system. Additionally, we demonstrate that the paramagnetic-spin glass transition exhibits universal critical behavior independent of the disorder. Our findings provide valuable insights into the fundamental properties and universality of gauge glass models.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们研究了三维SU(2)规范玻璃模型中的临界现象，该模型可视为具有规范对称性的O(4)自旋玻璃模型。通过蒙特卡洛模拟和非平衡弛豫方法，我们考察了沿不同无序程度相边界处的临界行为。与先前研究一致，我们验证了弱无序对普适类无关；铁磁-顺磁转变的临界行为仍属于纯铁磁系统的三维O(4)普适类。此外，我们证明顺磁-自旋玻璃转变表现出与无序程度无关的普适临界行为。这些发现为规范玻璃模型的基本性质与普适性提供了重要见解。</p></details> | 2026-06-24 | Yosei Takada et al. |
| 5 | **[Offline Channel-Independent QAOA Angles for RIS Power Aggregation: Unit-Circle Phase Dictionaries and Infinite-Size Spin-Glass Limits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.24540v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Reconfigurable intelligent surfaces (RIS) maximize received power by setting per-element phases. Discrete-phase optimization is NP-hard in the worst case, while the quantum approximate optimization algorithm (QAOA) applied to RIS faces limited phase alphabets, either per-problem angle optimization or uncharacterized training cost exposed to barren plateaus, and no scalable performance benchmark. We introduce a $2^{M}$-phase $θ$ dictionary for optimizing power $\|\mathbf{A} \, e^{jθ}\|^{2}$ having $K \times N$ channel matrix $\mathbf{A}$ and QAOA angle offline optimization with instance and size-independent infinite-size limit of the mixed-$q$ Gaussian ensemble of Basso et al. Our design bounds the spin-Hamiltonian interaction order to at most quartic for any $M$, and the deployed order-2 reduction lies below the even-$q\!\ge\!4$ regime in which constant-level QAOA limitations are proved. We perform analytical, state-vector, matrix-product-state and Pauli-path-simulation numerical studies for $N=K \leq 100$ and QAOA depth $p=9$, verifying offline angle transfer to Rayleigh, Rician/line-of-sight, cascaded double-fading and spatially-correlated RIS channels at $N\!\in\!\{5,12\}$. We observe performance reaching a near-optimal multi-start single-flip local-search reference for $N\!\le\!16$ under order-2 modeling with $2^{5}{=}32$-phase dictionary while the order-4 model shows a performance ceiling below the classical reference. The approach suggests a route to near-optimal large-$N$ performance on future fault-tolerant (FTQ) quantum computers, which enable the higher-depth QAOA circuits.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>可重构智能表面通过设置每个单元的相位来最大化接收功率。离散相位优化在最坏情况下是NP难问题，而应用于RIS的量子近似优化算法面临有限的相位字母表、每个问题角度的优化或暴露于贫瘠高原的未表征训练成本，且缺乏可扩展的性能基准。我们引入一个$2^{M}$相位的$\theta$字典来优化功率$\|\mathbf{A} \, e^{j\theta}\|^{2}$，其中包含$K \times N$信道矩阵$\mathbf{A}$，以及基于Basso等人混合$q$高斯系综的实例无关且规模无关的无限大极限的QAOA角度离线优化。我们的设计将自旋哈密顿量相互作用阶数限制为对于任意$M$最多为四次，且所采用的二阶约简低于已证明存在恒定水平QAOA限制的偶$q\!\ge\!4$区域。我们对$N=K \leq 100$和QAOA深度$p=9$进行了分析、态矢量、矩阵乘积态和泡利路径模拟数值研究，验证了在$N\!\in\!\{5,12\}$时离线角度向瑞利、莱斯/视距、级联双衰落和空间相关RIS信道的迁移。我们观察到，在采用$2^{5}{=}32$相位字典的二阶建模下，对于$N\!\le\!16$，性能接近多起点单翻转局部搜索参考的最优值，而四阶模型则显示出低于经典参考的性能上限。该方法为未来容错量子计算机上实现接近最优的大$N$性能提供了一条路径，这些量子计算机能够支持更高深度的QAOA电路。</p></details> | 2026-06-23 | Burhan Gulbahar et al. |
| 6 | **[Scalable Physics-Inspired Transformers for Spin Glasses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22984v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Efficient sampling of the Boltzmann distribution in frustrated spin glasses is central to statistical mechanics and combinatorial optimization. Despite advances in machine-learning-based approaches, two issues persist: limited understanding of why variational models fail to benefit from increased scale, unlike the monotonic scaling law of large language models; and high computational cost on large systems that negates advantages over classical sampling methods. Here, we develop a physics-inspired transformer with interpretable sparse attention and spin-tailored positional embeddings to address these challenges. By further leveraging FlashAttention for parallel ancestral sampling, it achieves up to two orders of magnitude speedup over vanilla variational autoregressive networks, enabling neural-network simulations of spin-glass systems to unprecedented sizes on a single GPU. It can resolve full probability distributions, free energies, and overlap statistics across temperatures, for Sherrington-Kirkpatrick and 2D or 3D Edwards-Anderson models, where existing machine-learning methods encounter limitations at certain temperatures. This framework thus establishes a scalable paradigm for frustrated spin-glass systems.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在受挫自旋玻璃中高效采样玻尔兹曼分布是统计力学和组合优化的核心问题。尽管基于机器学习的方法取得了进展，但仍存在两个问题：对变分模型为何未能像大语言模型的单调缩放律那样从规模扩大中受益的理解有限；以及在大系统上的高计算成本抵消了相对于经典采样方法的优势。在此，我们开发了一种具有可解释稀疏注意力和自旋定制位置嵌入的物理启发式Transformer来应对这些挑战。通过进一步利用FlashAttention进行并行祖先采样，它比普通变分自回归网络实现了高达两个数量级的加速，使得自旋玻璃系统的神经网络模拟能够在单个GPU上达到前所未有的规模。它可以解析谢林顿-柯克帕特里克模型以及二维或三维爱德华兹-安德森模型在不同温度下的完整概率分布、自由能和重叠统计量，而现有机器学习方法在特定温度下会遇到限制。因此，该框架为受挫自旋玻璃系统建立了一个可扩展的范式。</p></details> | 2026-06-23 | Lu Zhong et al. |
| 7 | **[Irreversibility Enhances Quantum-Enhanced Markov-Chain Monte Carlo](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23350v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Detailed balance underlies conventional Markov-chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) algorithms. Yet in classical systems, breaking detailed balance generates irreversible probability currents and can accelerate sampling. Whether irreversibility can similarly enhance quantum MCMC remains an intriguing question. Here we show that irreversibility provides a new route to improving the recent quantum-enhanced MCMC (QEMC), which combines quantum proposals with classical acceptance. By introducing state-dependent proposals that break detailed balance while preserving the target stationary distribution, we develop an irreversible quantum-enhanced Monte Carlo (IQEMC). Guided by Landau-Zener transitions, IQEMC promotes large energy descents from high-energy states while maintaining stable transitions near low-energy states. On spin-glass benchmarks, IQEMC outperforms QEMC without increasing computational complexity and, unlike the annealing baseline, exhibits a spectral gap that increases with system size and annealing speed. These results establish irreversibility as a physically grounded mechanism for enhancing quantum MCMC.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>细致平衡是传统马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛（MCMC）算法的基础。然而在经典系统中，打破细致平衡会产生不可逆的概率流，并可能加速采样。不可逆性能否同样增强量子MCMC仍是一个引人入胜的问题。本文证明，不可逆性为改进近期提出的量子增强MCMC（QEMC）提供了新途径，该算法将量子提议与经典接受相结合。通过引入打破细致平衡同时保持目标平稳分布的状态依赖提议，我们开发了不可逆量子增强蒙特卡洛（IQEMC）算法。在朗道-齐纳跃迁的引导下，IQEMC促进高能态向低能态的大幅下降，同时维持低能态附近的稳定跃迁。在自旋玻璃基准测试中，IQEMC在不增加计算复杂度的情况下优于QEMC，并且与退火基线不同，其谱隙随系统规模和退火速度增大而增大。这些结果确立了不可逆性作为增强量子MCMC的物理驱动机制。</p></details> | 2026-06-22 | Kefan Cao et al. |
| 8 | **[Universal energy-space localization and stable quantum phases against time-dependent perturbations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.14160v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Stability against perturbations is a highly nontrivial property of quantum systems and is often a requirement to define new phases. In most systems where stability can be rigorously established, only static perturbations are considered; whether any system can remain stable against generic time-dependent perturbations is largely elusive. In this work, we identify a universal phenomenon in driving $q$-local Hamiltonians called energy-space localization and prove that it can survive under generic time-dependent perturbations, where the evolving state is exponentially localized in an energy window of the instantaneous spectrum. For spin glass models where the configuration spaces are separated by large energy barriers, the localization in energy spaces can induce a true localization in configuration spaces and robustly break ergodicity. We then demonstrate its applications in several systems with such barriers. For certain LDPC codes, we show that the system remains localized near the original codeword for an exponentially long time even under generic time-dependent perturbations. For classical optimization problems with clustered solution space, the stability becomes an obstacle for quantum Hamiltonian-based algorithms to escape local minima. Our work provides a new lens for analyzing non-equilibrium dynamics of generic quantum systems, and versatile mathematical tools for establishing stability and for designing quantum algorithms.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>对扰动的稳定性是量子系统一个高度非平凡的性质，且通常是定义新相的条件。在大多数可以严格建立稳定性的系统中，仅考虑静态扰动；任何系统能否在一般时间依赖扰动下保持稳定仍是一个难以捉摸的问题。本文在驱动$q$-局域哈密顿量中识别出一种称为能量空间局域化的普适现象，并证明它在一般时间依赖扰动下能够存续，其中演化态在瞬时谱的能量窗口内呈指数局域化。对于构型空间被大能量势垒分隔的自旋玻璃模型，能量空间中的局域化可诱导出构型空间中的真正局域化，并稳健地打破遍历性。随后，我们展示了该方法在若干具有此类势垒的系统中的应用。对于某些LDPC码，我们证明即使在一般时间依赖扰动下，系统也能在指数长的时间内局域于原始码字附近。对于解空间具有聚类结构的经典优化问题，该稳定性成为基于量子哈密顿量的算法逃离局部极小值的障碍。本文为分析一般量子系统的非平衡动力学提供了新视角，并为建立稳定性和设计量子算法提供了多功能的数学工具。</p></details> | 2026-06-19 | Hongye Yu et al. |
